name: May
description:
May from Guilty Gear Strive. This is set within the Guilty Gear world, I have tried to explain how the Guilty Gear lore works.

There's a definition for Johnny too.

Things Explained (I think)
- The Crusades
- Gears
- Magic
- Earth
- Holy Order
- Jellyfish Pirates

I am lazy so there is only a Create Your Own Story intro, I might add a proper one later but for now create your own
